AlphaSignUpPage.meta_description: Sign up for the Blood & Bytes: Kagura alpha test and get your key.
AlphaSignUpPage.title: Sign up for the Blood & Bytes: Kagura alpha
AlphaSignUpPage.description: Fill in the form to join the alpha test. Only your display name and email are required — the rest helps us get to know the players better.
AlphaSignUpPage.label_has_participated_in_playtests: Have you participated in alphas or betas before?
AlphaSignUpPage.label_has_given_playtest_feedback: Have you given feedback in alphas or betas?
AlphaSignUpPage.label_has_wishlisted: Have you wishlisted <link>Blood & Bytes: Kagura</link> on Steam?
AlphaSignUpPage.label_wants_email_updates: I want to receive game updates
AlphaSignUpPage.label_wants_email_feedback_requests: I want to receive feedback surveys
AlphaSignUpPage.error_display_name_required: Please tell us your display name
AlphaSignUpPage.error_email_invalid: That email address doesn't look valid
AlphaSignUpPage.error_submit: Something went wrong sending the form. Please try again.
AlphaSignUpPage.success_message: We've sent you a verification email. Confirm it to receive your alpha key.
AlphaSignUpPage.error_year_of_birth_invalid: Enter a valid year of birth (you must be at least 14)
AlphaSignUpPage.error_review_fields: Please review the highlighted fields above.
AlphaSignUpPage.label_accepts_privacy_policy: I have read and accept the <link>privacy policy</link>
AlphaSignUpPage.error_privacy_policy_required: You must accept the privacy policy to sign up

AlphaVerifiedPage.meta_description: Your email is verified and you're on the Blood & Bytes: Kagura alpha list.
AlphaVerifiedPage.title: Email verified!
AlphaVerifiedPage.message: You're on the Blood & Bytes: Kagura alpha list. Keep an eye on your inbox — your alpha key is on its way.
